name: voice-agent-expert
description: This skill is a practical, 'use-it-while-debugging' reference for getting a LiveKit + Letta voice agent working reliably.
capabilities: Diagnose complete voice agent system health across all services
Detect and kill duplicate voice agent processes
Start voice services with proper dependency checking
Validate environment variables and API keys
author: EGAdams
securitySummary: Legitimate voice agent diagnostic and management skill. All static findings represent standard service administration patterns for local development. Scripts only access localhost services, read user-configured environment files, and generate tokens for the user's own session. No external data transmission or credential exfiltration detected.
valueStatement: Voice conversations with AI agents often fail due to duplicate processes and mode mismatches. This skill provides instant diagnostics and automated fixes for Letta voice agent systems.
limitations: Requires specific Letta and LiveKit server setup
Scripts use hardcoded paths that need adjustment for your system
Only works with Python-based voice agents
Needs manual service startup for some components

useCases.title: Debug voice agent timeouts
useCases.description: Quickly identify why your Letta voice agent is not responding or timing out during conversations.

useCases.title: Automate voice service startup
useCases.description: Start voice services in correct order with dependency checks and duplicate prevention.

useCases.title: Fix audio cutting issues
useCases.description: Resolve intermittent audio problems caused by duplicate voice agent processes.

promptTemplates.title: Basic diagnostics
promptTemplates.prompt: Run a full diagnostic on my Letta voice agent system and tell me what is wrong

promptTemplates.title: Generate token
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a new LiveKit token for connecting to my voice agent

promptTemplates.title: Start services
promptTemplates.prompt: Start my voice agent system with all required services in the correct order

promptTemplates.title: Emergency restart
promptTemplates.prompt: Perform a complete restart of my voice agent system, killing any stuck processes

bestPractices: Always use dev mode for local testing, never start mode
Check for duplicate processes before troubleshooting
Use diagnostic script first to identify the root cause
antiPatterns: Starting voice agent directly without dependency checks
Using start mode for local development instead of dev mode
Ignoring duplicate process warnings in system logs

faq.question: Is this compatible with all Letta versions?
faq.answer: Designed for Letta with LiveKit integration. Requires specific voice agent setup with WebRTC support.

faq.question: What are the system requirements?
faq.answer: Requires Letta server on port 8283, LiveKit server on port 7880, and Python voice agent with proper environment variables.

faq.question: Can I integrate this with my existing voice setup?
faq.answer: Scripts use hardcoded paths that need adjustment. Modify environment file locations for your system.

faq.question: Is my API key data safe?
faq.answer: Scripts only read existing environment files. No data is transmitted or stored externally.

faq.question: Voice still cuts out after using scripts
faq.answer: Check browser WebSocket connections and microphone permissions. Ensure single voice agent process is running.

faq.question: How does this compare to manual troubleshooting?
faq.answer: Automates common fixes like duplicate detection and service startup order, saving hours of manual debugging.
